Name: Label
Description: A display label for the ProcessingEvent.

Name: ControlOperation
Description: Description of a Control Operation used to facilitate data control.

Name: CleaningOperation
Description: Description of a Cleaning Operation such as consistency checking, invalid or out of range values, etc.

Name: WeightingReference
Description: Description of the weighting processes and any resultant standard weights.

Name: DataAppraisalInformation
Description: Description of the data appraisal processing including the resultant sampling error and response rate.

Name: ProcessingInstructionReference
Description: Reference to a processing instruction (GeneralInstruction or GenerationInstruction) used during the processing event. The basic Reference structure is extended to allow for the use of ParameterLinkage to link specific source parameters to the InParameter of the instruction to reflect its use within this specific Processing Event. TypeOfObject should be set to GeneralInstruction or GenerationInstruction.

Name: QualityStatementReference
Description: Reference to a quality statement relating to the processing event.
